Appearances:
Plaintiff SST Investments LLC is present. Represented by Siavash Tahbazof.
Attorney Yosef Tahbazof appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Victoria Tucker is present. Jazmanika Robinson and Jjamariea Newt are not present.
Attorney Kristin Messer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of June -11-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
